name: Quality Tier 5 — 3-table joins with lookup label resolution
description: Three-table joins where the LLM must resolve labels across the join chain. Tests the join-graph resolver + multi-FK disambiguation + label projection.

Scenarios.Question: list every ticket with the customer name and their region
Scenarios.ExpectedShape: SELECT Tickets.* + Customers.FullNameEn + Regions.NameEn, JOIN Customers JOIN Regions
Scenarios.Notes: 3-table chain via FK. Every ticket has a customer who has a region — 83 rows.

Scenarios.Question: show every outage with its service type and responsible department
Scenarios.ExpectedShape: SELECT Outages.* + ServiceTypes.NameEn + Departments.NameEn, JOIN both
Scenarios.Notes: Outages have FKs to both ServiceType and Department. Resolver must walk both.

Scenarios.Question: list each ticket with its priority and its status
Scenarios.ExpectedShape: SELECT Tickets.* + TicketPriorities.Name + TicketStatuses.Name, JOIN both lookups
Scenarios.Notes: Two lookups off the same root. Both should be label-projected.

Scenarios.Question: high priority tickets with the customer's full name
Scenarios.ExpectedShape: SELECT Tickets.* + Customers.FullNameEn, JOIN TicketPriorities WHERE Name='High' (filter on joined lookup), JOIN Customers
Scenarios.Notes: Filter on one joined lookup + label projection from another joined table.
